abilities.name: stakeout
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's moves have double power against Pokémon that switched in this turn.

abilities.effect: Makes the Pokémon move last within its move's priority bracket.

abilities.name: stalwart
abilities.effect: Ignores moves and abilities that draw in moves.

abilities.name: stamina
abilities.effect: Raises this Pokémon's Defense by one stage when it takes damage from a move.

abilities.name: stance-change
abilities.effect: Changes Aegislash to Blade Forme before using a damaging move, or Shield Forme before using King’s Shield.

abilities.name: static
abilities.effect: Has a 30% chance of paralyzing attacking Pokémon on contact.

abilities.name: steadfast
abilities.effect: Raises Speed one stage upon flinching.

abilities.effect: No effect description available.

abilities.name: stench
abilities.effect: Has a 10% chance of making target Pokémon flinch with each hit.

abilities.name: sticky-hold
abilities.effect: Prevents a held item from being removed by other Pokémon.

abilities.name: storm-drain

abilities.name: strong-jaw
abilities.effect: Strengthens biting moves to 1.5× their power.

abilities.name: sturdy
abilities.effect: Prevents being KOed from full HP, leaving 1 HP instead.  Protects against the one-hit KO moves regardless of HP.

abilities.name: suction-cups

abilities.name: super-luck
abilities.effect: Raises moves' critical hit rates one stage.

abilities.name: supersweet-syrup
abilities.effect: Once per battle, when a Pokémon with Supersweet Syrup enters the battle, it lowers the evasion stat of all adjacent opponents by one stage.

abilities.name: supreme-overlord
abilities.effect: Attack and Special Attack are boosted for each party Pokémon that has been defeated.

abilities.name: surge-surfer

abilities.name: swift-swim
abilities.effect: Doubles Speed during rain.

abilities.name: sword-of-ruin
abilities.effect: Lowers Defense of all Pokémon except itself.

abilities.name: symbiosis

abilities.name: synchronize

abilities.name: tablets-of-ruin
abilities.effect: Lowers Attack of all Pokémon except itself.

abilities.name: tangled-feet

abilities.name: tangling-hair

abilities.name: technician

abilities.name: teraform-zero
